rationale: Core differentiator: 29 commits to CodeSubmission.java, full CodeExecutionService with 10-worker ExecutorService, ConcurrentHashMap UUID tracking, scheduled cleanup, and DinD production setup. Strong systems-design story with measurable benchmark results in metrics/benchmark.py.

display_name: LangChain4j AI agent with autonomous tool calling
rationale: 20+ commits building end-to-end LLM integration: Gemini backend, multi-message chat UI, react-markdown rendering, and @AiService/@Tool agent that autonomously executes code to verify fixes. Goes well beyond a basic API wrapper.

Multiple deployment layers authored by the user: Docker-in-Docker container, Caddy reverse proxy with TLS, Fly.io CI/CD via GitHub Actions, and Vercel frontend with CORS configuration. Demonstrates DevOps breadth beyond local development.

Micrometer/Prometheus instrumentation with @Timed AOP aspects, Prometheus scrape config, and a Python benchmark suite that measures latency, concurrency speedup, queue saturation, timeout enforcement, and Docker overhead against the live deployment.

display_name: React IDE frontend with Monaco Editor + polling UX
rationale: 25 commits to App.jsx building a polished IDE: Monaco Editor with custom themes, UUID-based execution polling, draggable split-pane layout, dark/light mode, multi-tab interface with persistent chat state, and terminal-style markdown rendering.
